title: Actions n' Java
description: This is one part recreation, one part re-imagination of Actions & Stuff on Bedrock edition!
body:
# What is this modpack?
- This is a recreation and reeimagination of the bedrock edition Add-On called Actions & Stuff. It adds more player and mob animations, 3d items and so much more to make the game feel fresh and enjoyable!
- I also included some utilities like the Replay Mod and Dynamic Lighting to help make content creation and general play easier.
Finally you can optionally enable the Complimentary Shaders (or any other you want!) through Iris, but this will disable the in-game fog I included.

**Check out the gallery for screenshots!**



# Known Issues
  1. The mod included for chest animations (from the fresh animations extended pack) has a bug with the chest model. While i included a fix for the inventory, it will look broken when holding the item.
   2. Some player animations (the fresh player animation pack) have been disabled by default since they break skin layers. If you don't have any on your skin, turn it on for the optimal experience.
